name: Python 3
updateContentCommand: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y golang-go && curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; [ -f requirements.txt ] && pip3 install --user -r requirements.txt; pip3 install --user streamlit; echo '✅ Environment Ready'
